svg.title: Synalux POS — age verification
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for age verification. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Alcohol item detected: 1× Draft Beer ($6.00) at T9 — ID must be verified before adding to order
Point camera at back of ID (PDF417 barcode)
DOB on file from loyalty profile
Tap YES to approve · Tap NO to require full DOB entry
AAMVA standard DL data format extracted
🔒 Privacy: Full ID data NOT stored
Only: pass/fail result + last 4 of doc number + timestamp
Synalux POS — Age Verification / ID Scan (MVP · iOS Vision PDF417 + Manual DOB · 1366×1024)
